_comment: Row geometry of the pre-printed 1850 schedule form, in pixels of the full-resolution page image. Calibrated on reel populationschedu0604unix (6568x8424) and validated against the printed margin line numbers (line 38 = the Ira Knickerbocker row). row1_top = y of the top of line 1; row_pitch = height of one ruled row; band_rows = rows per tile; crop_margin = px of slack added above/below each band so edge rows are not clipped (the model is told to ignore slivers). These are per-form constants; other reels/scans may need re-calibration.
